title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 476.455 - All judges under nonpartisan plan eligible for retirement
text:
476.455.  All judges under nonpartisan plan eligible for retirement. — Any person having reached the age of sixty-five years, and having served an aggregate of twelve years continuously or otherwise as a judge of any of the courts whose judge or judges are required to be selected under the provisions of Section 29, Article V of the Constitution, shall have the same rights and privileges upon the same conditions as are provided for the judges and commissioners specified in section 476.450.
(L. 1953 p. 391 § 1)
